Class DeviceIdProvider

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventparticipation.DeviceIdProvider
public class DeviceIdProvider extends Object
Utility class for getting and validating the device ID used by the app.

This ID is used to identify an entrant without requiring a username and password.

Relevant user story:

  • US 01.07.01 - As an entrant, I want to be identified by my device so I don’t need a username and password.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    getId(android.content.Context context)
    Returns the device ID for this app.
    static boolean
    isValidId(String id)
    Checks whether the given device ID is valid.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public static String getId(android.content.Context context)
      Returns the device ID for this app.

      If the ID cannot be retrieved, returns "unknown_device".

      Parameters:
      context - context used to access the device settings
      Returns:
      the Android ID, or "unknown_device" if unavailable

    • isValidId

      public static boolean isValidId(String id)
      Checks whether the given device ID is valid.
      Parameters:
      id - the device ID to check
      Returns:
      true if the ID is not null, not empty, and not "unknown_device"
